strengths: 15+ years of progressive fullstack experience with direct TypeScript, Node.js, MongoDB, AWS CDK, Docker, and Kubernetes alignment to the primary stack
Active AI-agent and MCP (Model Context Protocol) infrastructure development at re:cinq satisfies the rare AI agent experience requirement
Demonstrated deep testing culture: authored D-language test frameworks, ran TDD/Selenium workshops, and applied TDD/CI/CD practices consistently across roles
concerns: Nest.js is absent from the resume entirely despite being a listed primary stack technology
Kotlin is not mentioned in skills or employment history; Python is listed as required but missing from the skills section
React exposure appears limited to one role (Optilyz) with no depth signaled; Vitest and Playwright are not mentioned
response.justification: Bogdan is a strong polyglot engineer whose current work in AI-agent tooling and MCP frameworks is a direct match for a differentiating requirement of this role. His TypeScript/Node.js pedigree, cloud/containerization exposure, and consistent testing discipline all align well. The primary risk is the complete absence of Nest.js, which is the core backend framework for the team; however, given his depth in Node.js ecosystems and demonstrated ability to pick up new stacks across a long career, this is a learnable gap rather than a disqualifier. Kotlin and deeper React proficiency would also need to be assessed.
